suites.title: cellarlite-full-implementation-next-js-1.spec.ts
US-0.1: View Full Bottle List

specs.title: navigating to / renders the page without login screen
each bottle row shows name, vintage, varietal, quantity, and location
page title or heading reads "My Cellar"

suites.title: US-0.2: View Empty-State When Cellar Has No Bottles

specs.title: shows "No bottles yet" when cellar is empty
shows "Add bottle" button in empty state
clicking "Add bottle" in empty state navigates to /bottles/new
no bottle rows are rendered in empty state

suites.title: US-0.3: Navigate to Edit Page from List Row

specs.title: clicking a bottle row navigates to /bottles/[id]/edit
link target contains the correct bottle id

suites.title: US-0.4: Navigate to Add Bottle from List Page

specs.title: "Add bottle" button is visible when list is populated
clicking "Add bottle" navigates to /bottles/new

suites.title: US-1.1: Add a New Bottle with All Fields

specs.title: form at /bottles/new has all five fields with visible labels
filling all fields and submitting creates the record and redirects to /
new bottle appears in the list with correct values

suites.title: US-1.2: Add a Bottle with Name Only

specs.title: submitting with only name succeeds and redirects to /
quantity defaults to 1 when quantity field is left blank

suites.title: US-1.3: Prevented from Submitting Without a Name

specs.title: empty name shows "Name is required" error and does not submit
field values entered before failed submit are preserved

suites.title: US-1.4: Cancel Adding a Bottle

specs.title: "Cancel" link is visible on /bottles/new
clicking Cancel navigates back to / without creating a bottle

suites.title: US-2.1: Open Edit Page with Pre-Populated Fields

specs.title: edit page has all five fields pre-populated
each field has a visible label

suites.title: US-2.2: Update Bottle Quantity

specs.title: changing quantity and saving redirects to / and shows updated count
quantity can be set to 0

suites.title: US-2.3: Update Any Bottle Field

specs.title: changing name and saving reflects in list
changing location and saving reflects in list
values persist across page reload

suites.title: US-2.4: Prevented from Saving Without a Name

specs.title: clearing name and saving shows "Name is required"
other field values preserved after failed validation

suites.title: US-2.5: Cancel Editing a Bottle

specs.title: "Cancel" link is visible on edit page
clicking Cancel navigates to / without saving changes

suites.title: US-2.6: Handle Navigation to Non-Existent Bottle

specs.title: navigating to /bottles/99999/edit shows "Bottle not found"
not-found page has a link back to /
navigating to /bottles/abc/edit also renders "Bottle not found"
no unhandled error or crash screen

suites.title: US-3.1: Delete a Bottle with Confirmation

specs.title: "Delete" button is visible on edit page
clicking Delete, confirming dialog, redirects to / and removes bottle
deleted bottle does not reappear on page reload

suites.title: US-3.2: Cancel Deletion — No Change Made

specs.title: cancelling confirm dialog keeps user on edit page
bottle still appears in list after cancelled delete

suites.title: US-4.1: Search Bottles by Partial Name

specs.title: search input is visible on /
searching for partial name narrows list to matching bottles
URL contains ?q=<term> when search is active
search input is pre-populated with current ?q= value on page load

suites.title: US-4.2: Search Is Case-Insensitive

specs.title: lowercase search returns bottle
uppercase search returns bottle
mixed-case search returns bottle

suites.title: US-4.3: Search Empty State — No Matching Bottles

specs.title: shows contextual no-results message containing the search term
"Add bottle" button is accessible in search-empty state

suites.title: US-4.4: Clear Search Restores Full List

specs.title: navigating to / without ?q shows full list
navigating from /?q= to / removes the filter

suites.title: US-4.5: Search State Persists on Page Reload

specs.title: loading /?q=UAT-Persist-Caymus shows only matching bottles
reloading the page preserves the filtered list
search input is pre-populated after reload

suites.title: US-5.1: Health Check Endpoint

specs.title: GET /api/health returns 200 with {"status":"ok"}
response Content-Type is application/json
no authentication required

suites.title: US-5.2: List All Bottles via API

specs.title: GET /api/bottles returns 200 with JSON array
each bottle object has all required fields
GET /api/bottles?q=UAT-API-List returns only matching bottles

suites.title: US-5.3: Create a Bottle via API

specs.title: POST /api/bottles returns 201 with created object
POST /api/bottles missing name returns 422 with error message
POST /api/bottles with quantity=0 returns 422

suites.title: US-5.4: Fetch Single Bottle via API

specs.title: GET /api/bottles/[id] returns 200 with bottle object
GET /api/bottles/99999 returns 404
GET /api/bottles/abc returns 404

suites.title: US-5.5: Update a Bottle via API

specs.title: PUT /api/bottles/[id] returns 200 with updated object
PUT allows quantity=0
PUT with quantity=-1 returns 422
PUT /api/bottles/99999 returns 404

suites.title: US-5.6: Delete a Bottle via API

specs.title: DELETE /api/bottles/[id] returns 204 with no body
deleted bottle no longer appears in GET /api/bottles
DELETE /api/bottles/99999 returns 404

suites.title: US-6.1: Bottles Table Created Automatically on First Start

specs.title: POST /api/bottles succeeds (table exists)

suites.title: US-6.2: Migration Is Idempotent

specs.title: API works correctly after multiple potential migrations (data intact)

suites.title: US-6.4: Data Persists Across Server Restarts / Page Reloads

specs.title: added bottle appears after page reload
navigating away and back preserves bottle in list

suites.title: US-7.1: App Is Fully Usable on 375px Mobile Screen

specs.title: home page renders without horizontal scroll at 375px
add bottle page renders without horizontal scroll at 375px

suites.title: US-7.2: App Is Readable on Desktop at 1440px

specs.title: home page renders without horizontal scroll at 1440px

suites.title: US-7.3: Primary Buttons Use Gold Accent Color

specs.title: submit button on add-bottle form uses gold color

suites.title: US-7.4: All Form Inputs Have Visible Labels

specs.title: all inputs on /bottles/new have visible labels
all inputs on edit page have visible labels

suites.title: US-7.5: App Loads Inside an Iframe Without Being Blocked

specs.title: response headers do not include X-Frame-Options: DENY
response headers do not block framing with frame-ancestors none
